question_sets.title: Graph DNA Discovery
questions: What larger system does it serve?
What should never be broken while this graph evolves?
Which kinds of entities belong here?
Which kinds of entities should be separate graphs?

question_sets.title: Entity Discovery
questions: What are the largest entities in this domain?
Which sub-entities have their own lifecycle?
What inputs does each entity receive?
What outputs does each entity produce?
How does each entity contribute to the parent DNA?
